title: G&T Ore Growth 4 Pack Support
description: Adds support for Ore Growth to work with Resource Nether Ores & The Undergarden & Silent Gear & Deeper and Darker.
body:
This is a mod that adds support for Resource Nether Ores & The Undergarden & Silent Gear & Deeper And Darker to work with Ore Growth should you have them installed.

It makes this:

https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-growth

Work with these:

https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker

https://modrinth.com/mod/silent-gear

https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-nether-ores

https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden

This mod will do nothing alone without Ore Growth and at least one of the four others installed.
